info.title: NihonGo BJT API
info.description: Generated OpenAPI contract for NihonGo BJT.

sharePostcardOptIn.description: Explicit learner consent for creating public share postcards/pages.

message.description: Error message, or (for class-validator) an array of validation messages in some responses.
String or object payload; conflict codes are machine-readable when present.

notes.example: User support console and per-user diagnostic detail are available.

accountType.description: Application role class (not the same as internal authz role codes in body).

checks.description: Map of dependency name → { status: ok|degraded, message?: string }

leeched.description: Whether card is currently in leeched state (detected at >=8 lapses)

comebackMode.description: Whether card is currently in comeback recovery mode

note.example: Remediation metadata is returned only after a review answer is submitted.

leechDetected.description: Whether card was detected as leeched on this review

leeched.description: Whether card is currently in leeched state (detected at >=8 lapses)

comebackMode.description: Whether card is currently in comeback recovery mode
